translation: What are they asking one another
About the most important topic [of Resurrection]
Concerning which they differ?
No , they will soon come to know!
notes: The negative interjection indicates that what the people had been surmising – that Resurrection was unlikely – was not based on knowledge.

translation: No, no, they will soon come to know [the Truth]!
Have We not made the earth specially prepred [for sustenance of life],
And the mountains as stabilisers ?
notes: Can one imagine the earth without its mountains? These give the earth surface its stability. Otherwise the predominant water would envelope it entirely. Also see [16:15] and study note 4 thereon.

translation: And We created you in pairs.
And We made your sleep a means of rest.
And We made the night as cover.
And We made the day for earning a livelihood.
And We have built above you seven strong [firmaments/heavens/atmospeherioc layers].
And We have made a blazing source of light.
And We send water pouring down in abundance from the rain-bearing clouds,
So that We may produce therewith grain and vegetation.
And gardens luxuriant.
Indeed, the Day of Decision is a divinely appointed time.

arabic: يَوۡمَ يُنفَخُ فِي ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأۡتُونَ أَفۡوَاجٗا
transliteration: Yawma yunfakhu fee alssoori fatatoona afwajan
translation: When that Day the trumpet is blown, you come out in droves,
And the heaven is opened as if it were gates,
And the mountains are moved away, as if they had been a mirage.
Indeed, Hell is waiting,
As home for the transgressors.
They shall remain therein for ages.

arabic: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرۡدٗا وَلَا شَرَابًا
transliteration: La yathooqoona feeha bardan wala sharaban
translation: They shall taste therein neither coolness nor any drink,
But boiling water and a pus-like thing.
An appropriate recompense!
They never expected to be called to account.
And they falsely rejected Our signs/Verses.
And We have recorded everything in a Book.
“So taste now [the punishment;] for, now, We shall increase on you nothing but punishment!”
Indeed, for the pious ones, there is salvation.
[They shall be in] gardens and vineyards,
And [with] likeable companions,
And cups filled to the brim.

arabic: لَّا يَسۡمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغۡوٗا وَلَا كِذَّـٰبٗا
transliteration: La yasmaAAoona feeha laghwan wala kiththaban
translation: They shall not hear any idle talk, or any lies, therein.
[Their life in the Hereafter] will be a reward from your Lord, a measured gift.
notes: Rabbi alssamawati waal-ardi wama baynahuma alrrahmani la yamlikoona minhu khitaban

arabic: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِۖ لَا يَمۡلِكُونَ مِنۡهُ خِطَابٗا
transliteration: Rabbi alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma alrrahmani la yamlikoona minhu khitaban
translation: The Lord of the heavens and the earth and all that lies between them, the Gracious! None shall have it in their power [in His presence] to address Him.
notes: Yawma yaqoomu alrroohu waalmala-ikatu saffan la yatakallamoona illa man athina lahu alrrahmanu waqala sawaban

arabic: يَوۡمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ صَفّٗاۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنۡ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابٗا
transliteration: Yawma yaqoomu alrroohu waalmalaikatu saffan la yatakallamoona illa man athina lahu alrrahmanu waqala sawaban
translation: The Day the Spirit and the angels stand in rows, none shall speak except those whom the Lord of Mercy permits, and who will say only what is right.
notes: See study notes 113 to 116 on [2:87] in PART I of this Tafsir.

arabic: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمُ ٱلۡحَقُّۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا
transliteration: Thalika alyawmu alhaqqu faman shaa ittakhatha ila rabbihi maaban
translation: That Day is sure to come. So let him, who wishes to, take the right path to return to his Lord.
notes: Inna antharnakum AAathaban qareeban yawma yanthuru almaro ma qaddamat yadahu wayaqoolu alkafiru ya laytanee kuntu turaban

arabic: إِنَّآ أَنذَرۡنَٰكُمۡ عَذَابٗا قَرِيبٗا يَوۡمَ يَنظُرُ ٱلۡمَرۡءُ مَا قَدَّمَتۡ يَدَاهُ وَيَقُولُ ٱلۡكَافِرُ يَٰلَيۡتَنِي كُنتُ تُرَٰبَۢا
transliteration: Inna antharnakum AAathaban qareeban yawma yanthuru almaro ma qaddamat yadahu wayaqoolu alkafiru ya laytanee kuntu turaban
translation: We have warned you of Punishment that is near. The Day when it comes, man shall see what his hands had sent ahead, and he who has suppressed the Truth shall say, “Oh, would that I was dust!”
notes: For any human being, the Punishment in the Hereafter is as near as death. He/she is completely unconscious of the period between death and Resurrection. To him/her that period, even if it may extend to thousands of years, would appear to be as little as a day or a part of it!
